dsl_rule.translation_notes: Translated 'Above the Stomach' pattern: Entry requires previous black candle (close < open) followed by white candle (close > open) with white candle opening above midpoint of black candle body (open > prev_open) and closing above midpoint (close > prev_open). Exit condition assumes reversal (close < open) since author did not specify. Pattern assumes downtrend context is validated at strategy level.

backtest_rule.reason: Translated 'Above the Stomach' pattern: Entry requires previous black candle (close < open) followed by white candle (close > open) with white candle opening above midpoint of black candle body (open > prev_open) and closing above midpoint (close > prev_open). Exit condition assumes reversal (close < open) since author did not specify. Pattern assumes downtrend context is validated at strategy level.

source_rule_text: Pattern name: Above the Stomach. A two-bar candlestick pattern where price enters after a downtrend, forms a black candle as the first line, followed by a white candle that opens and closes above the middle of the black candle's body, resulting in an upward breakout.
